prompt: Based on the uploaded clear reference photo of a single person, create a set of AI portraits themed 'Summer World Cup x Millennium Y2K x Kpop x Retro Film'. Must strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of the reference person: face shape, facial proportions, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, perceived age, hairline, and overall recognizability. No face swapping, no turning into a stranger, no excessive influencer face, no anime style, and no plastic doll face. The character is set as a young adult with a bright, confident, free, and vibrant aura, like a Kpop-style street idol captured by a film camera during a summer World Cup. Style integration: World Cup football atmosphere, retro football jerseys, Y2K millennium style, summer streets, Kpop makeup and styling, youthful vitality, retro film photography, disposable camera flash, 2000s magazine photoshoot vibes. The image must not contain real team crests, official FIFA logos, real football star names, or identifiable commercial brands. Abstract flags, colorful stands, footballs, green fields, street screens, fan scarves, retro jersey numbers, and sports accessories can be used to express the World Cup atmosphere. Texture requirements: realistic photography feel, preserving natural skin texture, real pores, and natural shadows. No excessive skin smoothing or AI doll faces. Lighting should be layered, colors vibrant but high-end, with slight film grain, slight overexposure, flash texture, and a summer airy feel. Composition: 3:4 vertical, like a high-budget fashion magazine shoot, not cheap studio style, not cosplay style, and not e-commerce model style. Negative constraints: Avoid: real team crests, FIFA logos, real stars' faces, brand logos, cheap cosplay, studio portrait style, plastic skin, AI doll faces, excessive smoothing, deformed features, incorrect body proportions, deformed fingers, dead black shadows, cluttered backgrounds, stiff expressions, influencer filters, anime style, game CG style, overly sexualized, or vulgar poses. 01 | Summer Pitch Kick-off: Scene is an outdoor football pitch under the afternoon sun, with green grass, white goals, distant colorful flags, and blurred stands in the background. The character stands near the sideline, wearing a modified retro football jersey, slightly loose on top, paired with low-rise denim shorts or a sports skirt, chunky sneakers, silver earrings, colorful hair clips, and Y2K sunglasses. The character holds a football in one hand and gently brushes back wind-blown hair with the other. Expression is bright, confident, with a touch of defiance, like the main visual of a World Cup summer opening. Looking into the lens, but not a stiff pose, like a moment caught by a friend with a film camera. Light is strong natural summer afternoon light with real hard light and shadows. Healthy skin glow. Vibrant colors. Retro film grain, slight overexposure, high-budget street fashion magazine feel. 02 | Street Screen Viewing: Scene is a city street on a summer evening, with an outdoor big screen showing blurred football match footage, surrounded by young people, colorful flags, drink stalls, neon signs, and summer street crowds. No real team logos or brands. Character wears a cropped sports tank top with loose low-rise cargo pants, covered by a colorful retro sports jacket, with wired headphones, waist chains, silver bracelets, and small hairpins. Standing on the edge of the crowd, holding an iced drink or soda, with the other hand raising a small flag or fan scarf. Expression is excited yet restrained, like the second before a goal is seen. Not stiff, body has a slight turn for a street-snap feel. Light is evening natural light mixed with cold light from the screen. Face has colored reflections. Background slightly blurred. 2000s summer street film snapshot style with flash texture and grain. 03 | Kpop Stage Jersey Styling: Simple but high-end studio scene with silver metallic curtains, colorful flags, retro TVs, and footballs, looking like a Y2K Kpop stage backstage. No real team crests. Character wears a modified retro football jersey, short hem but not vulgar, paired with a pleated skirt or loose sports pants. Kpop stage styling: glitter eyeshadow, jelly lips, wet hair strands, colorful clips, silver necklaces, and headset-style accessories. Refined makeup but preserving real skin texture. Character stands in the center, leaning forward slightly, one hand touching the headset, the other holding a football. Direct eye contact, confident, bright, and in control. Flash lighting with colored rim light. Y2K magazine cover texture. Sharp colors, obvious film grain, no plastic or anime feel. 04 | Convenience Store Iced Drink Vitality: Summer convenience store entrance during the World Cup, glass doors with colorful football posters, abstract flags, and blurred signs. Vending machines or coolers nearby. No real brands. Character wears a retro jersey jacket over a white crop top, low-rise denim shorts or sports shorts, colorful sunglasses, silver waist chain. Holding an iced drink with water droplets. Hair slightly damp from sweat and humidity. Leaning against the glass door, relaxed posture, one leg slightly bent. Expression is vibrant with a real, relaxed, warm summer smile. Mix of cold white convenience store light and warm evening outdoor light. Glass reflections on face. Like a summer memory from a disposable film camera—flash, grain, overexposure, high saturation. 05 | Seaside Football Summer: Summer seaside or beach football pitch, blue sea, sand, palm trees, colorful flags, and distant people playing football. World Cup vacation vibe without official logos. Colorful retro football jersey, sports shorts or denim skirt, baseball cap or headband, Y2K sunglasses, silver jewelry. Football at feet, holding a fan scarf or transparent water bottle. Running forward and looking back at the camera, hair and clothes blowing in the wind. Bright, free, smiling. Natural body proportions. Strong seaside sunlight, healthy skin glow, slightly overexposed background, clear blue sky and sea. Retro film grain, sun flares, summer airy feel, and youth movie vibe. 06 | Night Goal Party: Night street or rooftop party, colorful string lights, blurred big screen, abstract flags, footballs, drinks, and celebrating crowd. Atmosphere of a summer night carnival after a goal. No real team logos or commercial brands. Bright Y2K sports jacket over a crop top or jersey, low-rise jeans, silver waist chain, earrings, clips, and glitter makeup. Slight sweat and messy hair for realism. One hand raising a drink or scarf, other hand on hair or waist, leaning back slightly, caught by flash. Excited, beautiful, infectious expression. Direct flash at night, bokeh background. Retro film party feel, slight motion blur, flash highlights, real grain. 07 | Retro Stand Youth: Football stadium stands with colorful seats, abstract flags, blurred fans, and green pitch. World Cup stand street-snap style. No real team logos. Sitting on a stand seat in a loose retro jersey, short skirt, sports socks, and chunky shoes (or loose jeans and sneakers). Football, backpack, headphones, and iced drink nearby. Kpop lifestyle makeup. Not sitting upright but leaning forward naturally or looking back from the side. Story-like expression, as if caught by a friend during halftime. Clear, relaxed, youthful eyes. Slanted afternoon sunlight with real shadows from seats. Film grain, slight fading, high-saturated blue-green-orange palette. 08 | Y2K Magazine Cover Close-up: Half-body to close-up composition. Blurred colorful flags, football nets, silver metallic curtains, and blue sky. 2000s Kpop + Sports magazine cover. Retro jersey or sports tank, silver chains, and fan scarf around the neck. Kpop hairstyle: naturally voluminous, wet strands, colorful clips. Makeup: clear base, glitter eyeshadow, lashes, healthy blush, jelly lips. Real skin texture. Holding a football near the face or pressing a fan scarf. Direct eye contact, confident, beautiful, slightly playful and aggressive. Front flash plus natural light, clear face, slightly overexposed background. Retro film grain, Y2K high saturation, magazine cover texture, real photography feel. 09 | Twilight Final Whistle Conclusion: Empty football pitch after dusk, orange-pink sunset sky, blurred stands/flags, footballs, scarves, and water bottles on the grass. Quiet moment after a summer World Cup match. Sitting on the grass or pitch edge, wearing a retro jersey jacket, sports tank, and denim or sports shorts. Slightly messy hair, makeup still has glitter and sweat glow. Realistic fatigue yet bright look after exercise. One hand propped behind, other holding a football, looking at the sunset. Relaxed, satisfied, quiet, but still vibrant. Golden orange sunset backlighting with rim light. Warm highlights on grass and skin. Retro film feel, slight light leaks, soft grain, youth movie ending vibe.
